name: databento-mcp
description: Databento market data MCP server for Claude Desktop
long_description: Local Databento MCP server for CME futures market data, symbology, metadata, reference data, and guarded batch workflows. API keys are collected through sensitive configuration.

tools.name: get_futures_quote
tools.description: Get current price quote for ES or NQ futures contracts

tools.name: get_historical_bars
tools.description: Get historical OHLCV bars for futures contracts

tools.name: symbology_resolve
tools.description: Resolve symbols to instrument IDs or other symbol types

tools.name: timeseries_get_range
tools.description: Get historical Databento market data with guarded direct output

tools.name: metadata_list_schemas
tools.description: List schemas for a Databento dataset

tools.name: metadata_list_fields
tools.description: List fields for a Databento schema

tools.name: metadata_get_dataset_range
tools.description: Get the available date range for a Databento dataset

tools.name: batch_submit_job
tools.description: Submit a guarded Databento batch job

tools.name: batch_download
tools.description: Get metadata and URLs for completed Databento batch files

tools.name: reference_search_securities
tools.description: Search Databento reference security master data

databento_api_key.title: Databento API key
databento_api_key.description: Databento API key. This value is passed to the local MCP server as DATABENTO_API_KEY.

databento_dataset.title: Databento dataset
databento_dataset.description: Default Databento dataset for futures workflows.

direct_max_records.title: Direct timeseries max records
direct_max_records.description: Maximum direct records returned by timeseries_get_range before batch is required.

require_zero_cost_preflight_for_batch.title: Require zero-cost batch preflight
require_zero_cost_preflight_for_batch.description: Require Databento metadata_get_cost to estimate zero cost before submitting batch jobs.
